nodes.name: 鹬科
nodes.summary: 鹬科（Scolopacidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联71种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、Upland sandpiper、小杓鹬等71种鸟类。

nodes.name: 滩涂围垦
nodes.summary: 滨海滩涂被转化为建设或农业用地。

nodes.name: 尖尾滨鹬
nodes.summary: 尖尾滨鹬（Sharp-tailed sandpiper，学名 Calidris acuminata），分类上属于鸻形目，并归入鹬科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于澳大拉西亞，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、滩涂围垦。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 澳大拉西亞
nodes.summary: 澳大拉西亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括白眉鸭、Superb fruit dove、小田鸡等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联211种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等211种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They have a complex migration, with adults departing Siberia in July and juveniles in August to head south, with the majority of the population wintering in Australasia

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species is currently listed as vulnerable globally by the IUCN in 2021, with an estimated number of 60,000 to 120,000 mature individuals and a decreasing population trend. The major threats to the species are habitat loss, with the staging areas used in migration being reduced through reclamation of land for aquaculture or degraded from human activities

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species is currently listed as vulnerable globally by the IUCN in 2021, with an estimated number of 60,000 to 120,000 mature individuals and a decreasing population trend. The major threats to the species are habitat loss, with the staging areas used in migration being reduced through reclamation of land for aquaculture or degraded from human activities
